---
title: "Chris Edwards"
image: "images/profile.jpg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/edchris/"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/edchris_"
  - label: Google Scholar
    url: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Ce18xdAAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:c8.edwards@qut.edu.au"
output:
  postcards::trestles
site: distill::distill_website
---
 


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## Bio

I am a Senior Lecturer in the School of Clinical Sciences and Course coordinator of the Graduate Diploma in Medical Ultrasound at QUT. I am an accredited Medical Sonographer and registered Medical Radiation Practitioner and hold a concurrent position as a clinical Radiographer/Sonographer within QLD Health. My interests are in applied ultrasound technology, educational leadership and national accreditation standards. I am currently collaborating with Mater Research and the QLD Family Cohort, exploring the role of ultrasound elastography to assess the placenta.

## Projects
